decisions.summary: scope_reviewability accepted: this PR is one reviewer sized because all changed source, docs, registry, and tests serve the single structured intake to design-modernize plan workflow; review_owner_map and split_plan are explicit.
decisions.reason: review_owner_map: uiux-intake owns intake artifact semantics; design-modernize owns plan consumption; cli owns command surface; story spec architecture and design-ssot own contract context; tests own regression coverage. split_plan: current_branch_pr is appropriate because there is no unrelated cleanup or separate runtime UI surface bundled.
